text:
The user is showing me that `canvas/hotdog.hotdog` was added to the canvas. This is the card instance I built earlier — it appears Mica registered it as a new file on the canvas. This is the hot dog detector card I already built and verified.

This is a `[File activity]` signal — just a notification that a file changed. The card I built is already on canvas, already verified as CLEAN. No action needed.
